title: torenia rotundifolia
intro: Torenia rotundifolia, also known as Round-leaved Toad Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Torenia rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Journal of Asian natural products research", torenia rotundifolia phenylethanol glycosides 3-6 exhibited significant antioxidant activities in DPPH radical scavenging assay.
